channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Report Says Trump Delayed DNI Nominee Hearing After Dispute With Senate Majority Leader John Thune
item.description: According to a report cited by Raw Story from Politico journalist Meredith Lee Hill, President Donald Trump unexpectedly pulled a scheduled confirmation hearing for his nominee for Director of Nationa...

item.title: Rare 1977 Blondie Photoshoot Captured Beneath the Aging Hollywood Sign During the Band’s Rise
item.description: This article revisits a notable 1977 photo session featuring the band Blondie beneath the Hollywood Sign in Los Angeles, California. The photographs were taken by music photographer Richard Creamer wh...

item.title: G7 Leaders Back U.S.-Led Iran Ceasefire Efforts and Show Greater Unity Among Allies
item.description: Leaders attending the Group of Seven (G7) summit expressed support for U.S. President Donald Trump's tentative agreement with Iran aimed at maintaining stability in the Strait of Hormuz and extending ...

item.title: Trump Defends Preliminary Iran Memorandum at G7 Summit and Warns of Military Action if Terms Are Violated
item.description: President Donald Trump responded forcefully to questions about a preliminary memorandum of understanding (MOU) between the United States and Iran while attending the G7 summit in Évian-les-Bains, Fran...

item.title: Morning Joe Panel Questions Trump's Focus on Kennedy Center Naming Dispute Amid Broader Political Challenges
item.description: A discussion on MSNBC's 'Morning Joe' focused on President Donald Trump's attention to the naming controversy surrounding the Kennedy Performing Arts Center in Washington, D.C., with panelists suggest...

item.title: CNN Panel Debate on Georgia GOP Primary Shifts From Culture-War Messaging to Transgender Policy Dispute

item.title: Trump Keeps Bill Pulte as Acting DNI and Announces Cancellation of Planned Senate Confirmation Hearing

item.title: FBI Interview in Epstein Files Describes Alleged Recruitment of Women at Trump Tower in the Early 1990s
item.description: A document contained within the large release of Epstein-related files includes an FBI interview conducted in 2021 with a woman who described events she said occurred at Trump Tower in New York during...

item.title: Lok Sabha Speaker to hear TMC leadership and rebel MPs before deciding on recognition dispute
item.description: Lok Sabha Speaker Om Birla has scheduled a meeting with Trinamool Congress (TMC) leader Abhishek Banerjee on June 19 to hear the party's position regarding claims made by a rebel faction within the TM...

item.title: Shipping Backlog and Mine-Clearing Efforts Continue Despite Trump’s Strait of Hormuz Reopening Announcement

item.title: Opinion Column Criticizes Trump's Handling of Proposed Iran Agreement and Lack of Transparency
item.description: This opinion article by journalist Ray Richmond argues that the Trump administration's reluctance to disclose details of a recently announced memorandum of understanding (MOU) with Iran suggests that ...

item.title: Final Fantasy Tactics: The Ivalice Chronicles Version 1.5.0 Introduces New Game+ and Multiple Quality-of-Life Improvements
item.description: Square Enix has released update 1.5.0 for Final Fantasy Tactics: The Ivalice Chronicles on Nintendo Switch and Nintendo Switch 2, adding several new features, gameplay improvements, and additional lan...

item.title: Fedot Sychkov’s Colorful Celebrations of Rural Russian Life and Tradition
item.description: This article highlights the life and artistic legacy of Fedot Sychkov (1870–1958), a Russian painter renowned for his vibrant and optimistic portrayals of rural life. Born into a poor peasant family i...

item.title: Dr. Ekua Amoakoh Defends NPP Record on Afari Military Hospital Amid Renewed Political Debate
item.description: Dr. Ekua Amoakoh, the New Patriotic Party (NPP) spokesperson on health, has pushed back against claims that the NPP failed to make progress on the Afari Military Hospital project during its eight year...

item.title: Rep. Claudia Tenney Draws Criticism After Raising Antisemitism Concerns Ahead of Knicks Championship Parade

item.title: CNN Panel Challenges Conservative Commentator's Defense of Trump's Iran Negotiations

item.title: Georgia GOP gubernatorial runoff: Trump-endorsed candidate Burt Jones defeated by businessman Rick Jackson
item.description: In Georgia’s Republican gubernatorial runoff, voters delivered a notable setback to President Donald Trump’s influence within the state GOP. Businessman Rick Jackson defeated Lieutenant Governor Burt ...

item.title: Cape Verde Holds Spain to a Scoreless Draw Behind Veteran Goalkeeper Vozinha
item.description: Cape Verde produced one of the most surprising results of the World Cup by holding Spain to a 0-0 draw in Atlanta. Entering the match as overwhelming underdogs, the African nation relied on a discipli...

item.title: Mike Pence Criticizes Trump's Reported Iran Deal and Opposes Sanctions Relief
item.description: Former Vice President Mike Pence publicly criticized President Donald Trump's reported Iran agreement during an interview with CNN's Kaitlan Collins. Although the full details of the agreement have no...

item.title: Shiv Sena (UBT) MP Urges Lok Sabha Speaker Not to Recognise Any Breakaway Group Amid Reports of Possible Defection by MPs
item.description: Shiv Sena (UBT) MP Arvind Sawant has written to Lok Sabha Speaker Om Birla requesting that no recognition, privileges, status, or facilities be granted to any group claiming to represent the party sep...
